acceptance_criteria.statement: /architect-team:mini is invocable and accepts both input forms (folder or prose).
A well-formed mini proposal.md with ## QA Guidance passes the contract validator; malformed fails with specific errors.
The Mini-Run: <slug> trailer extractor returns the slug for tagged commits and None for untagged.
The full test suite passes after the change.

unit_test_targets.assertion: rejects every malformed permutation in test_qa_guidance_contract.py
rejects the same malformed permutations in JSON form
returns slug for tagged commits, None for untagged, ignores prose mentions

integration_test_targets.assertion: all ~1350 tests PASS after the change

out_of_scope: Full sweep orchestrator (parallel slug processing, finding de-dup) — deferred to v0.10.1
Cross-language polyglot test-runner discovery — uses existing single-language heuristic
